'''鈭歠-b-g''' ('''kafabag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stagger|stagger]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stagger|stagger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-b-g
|-
! Lemma
| kafabag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifabag|thifabag]] || [[word:jifabag|jifabag]] || [[word:shifabag|shifabag]] || [[word:kifabag|kifabag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufabag|thuthufabag]] || [[word:jujufabag|jujufabag]] || [[word:shushufabag|shushufabag]] || [[word:kukufabag|kukufabag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufabag|thufabag]] || [[word:jufabag|jufabag]] || [[word:shufabag|shufabag]] || [[word:kufabag|kufabag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufabag|thufabag]] || [[word:jufabag|jufabag]] || [[word:shufabag|shufabag]] || [[word:kufabag|kufabag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefabag|thefabag]] || [[word:jefabag|jefabag]] || [[word:shefabag|shefabag]] || [[word:kefabag|kefabag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofabag|thothofabag]] || [[word:jojofabag|jojofabag]] || [[word:shoshofabag|shoshofabag]] || [[word:kokofabag|kokofabag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofabag|thofabag]] || [[word:jofabag|jofabag]] || [[word:shofabag|shofabag]] || [[word:kofabag|kofabag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofabag|thofabag]] || [[word:jofabag|jofabag]] || [[word:shofabag|shofabag]] || [[word:kofabag|kofabag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]] || [[word:fabag|fabag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fabag|th忙fabag]] || [[word:j忙fabag|j忙fabag]] || [[word:sh忙fabag|sh忙fabag]] || [[word:k忙fabag|k忙fabag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafabag|thathafabag]] || [[word:jajafabag|jajafabag]] || [[word:shashafabag|shashafabag]] || [[word:kakafabag|kakafabag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafabag|thafabag]] || [[word:jafabag|jafabag]] || [[word:shafabag|shafabag]] || [[word:kafabag|kafabag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafabag|thafabag]] || [[word:jafabag|jafabag]] || [[word:shafabag|shafabag]] || [[word:kafabag|kafabag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafabag|shafabag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafabag|goshafabag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafabag|gokishafabag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafabagn眉|shafabagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafabagnkn眉|goshafabagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabagn眉|gokishafabagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafabagsh毛|shafabagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafabagnksh毛|goshafabagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafabagsh毛|gokishafabagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabagro|shafabagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabagnkro|goshafabagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabagro|gokishafabagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabagmu|shafabagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabagnkmu|goshafabagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabagmu|gokishafabagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafabagsher|shafabagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafabagnksher|goshafabagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafabagsher|gokishafabagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafabagng|shafabagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafabagnkng|goshafabagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafabagng|gokishafabagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafabagya|shafabagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafabagnkya|goshafabagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafabagya|gokishafabagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafabagyam|shafabagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafabagnkyam|goshafabagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafabagyam|gokishafabagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabagn眉sh毛|shafabagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabagnkn眉sh毛|goshafabagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabagn眉sh毛|gokishafabagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabagn眉ro|shafabagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabagnkn眉ro|goshafabagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabagn眉ro|gokishafabagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabagn眉mu|shafabagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabagnkn眉mu|goshafabagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabagn眉mu|gokishafabagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabagsh毛n眉|shafabagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabagnksh毛n眉|goshafabagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabagsh毛n眉|gokishafabagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabagsh毛ro|shafabagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabagnksh毛ro|goshafabagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabagsh毛ro|gokishafabagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabagsh毛mu|shafabagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabagnksh毛mu|goshafabagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabagsh毛mu|gokishafabagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabagron眉|shafabagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabagnkron眉|goshafabagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabagron眉|gokishafabagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabagrosh毛|shafabagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabagnkrosh毛|goshafabagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabagrosh毛|gokishafabagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabagromu|shafabagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabagnkromu|goshafabagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabagromu|gokishafabagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabagmun眉|shafabagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabagnkmun眉|goshafabagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabagmun眉|gokishafabagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabagmush毛|shafabagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabagnkmush毛|goshafabagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabagmush毛|gokishafabagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabagmuro|shafabagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabagnkmuro|goshafabagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabagmuro|gokishafabagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
